'''Uso Yso''' was a [[Swoop/Legends|swoop bike]] shop owner on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Euceron]]. He was two meters taller than [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]. He had fifteen fingers on each hand that were the size of a [[Bantha/Legends|bantha]] haunch, and possessed two beating [[Heart/Legends|hearts]].

In [[26 BBY/Legends|26 BBY]], the [[Galactic Games/Legends|Galactic Games]] was held on Euceron. Yso was in charge of the illegal betting that occurred. He made a bet with [[Didi Oddo]] and won. But under false pretenses, Didi tried to use Kenobi in order to get his [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] back. This failed, but it did give Kenobi information that led him to uncover a plot by high-profile members of the [[Commerce Guild/Legends|Commerce Guild]] and the [[Games Council|Galactic Games Council]] to discredit several [[Senator/Legends|senators]] who opposed them in legislation that would bring the guild members power, prestige, and untold wealth through the control of banking practices in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Quest: The Dangerous Games]]'' {{1st}}
